properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v4

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Strength will rise as we wait upon the Lord We will wait upon the Lord, we will wait upon the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Our God, You reign forever Our hope, our Strong Deliverer

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the everlasting God The everlasting God You do not faint You won't grow weary

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You're the defender of the weak You comfort those in need You lift us up on the wings Like eagles

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause You are, You are the everlasting God The everlasting God You do not faint You won't grow weary
